data.name: AccountCreatedBody
data.value:
Your LawyerSys account has been created

Full name: {FullName}

Email: {Email}

Username: {UserName}

Temporary password: {Password}

Phone: {Phone}

Job: {Job}

Address: {Address}

Date of birth: {DateOfBirth}

SSN: {SSN}

Please change your password on first login. If you did not request this account, contact support.

data.name: RegistrationNotificationBody
data.value:
New registration pending activation

A new tenant administrator has registered and is waiting for SuperAdmin activation.

Full name{FullName}
Username{UserName}
Email{Email}
Office name{OfficeName}
Office phone{OfficePhone}
Country{Country}
Tenant ID{TenantId}
Registered at (UTC){RegisteredAtUtc}

Review the account and activate it from the administration screen when ready.

data.name: RegistrationPendingActivationMessage
data.value: Registration completed. Your account is pending activation by the system administrator.

data.name: AccountPendingActivationMessage
data.value: Your account is not active yet. Please contact the system administrator to activate your account.

data.name: PasswordResetRequiredMessage
data.value: Password reset required. Please reset your password before logging in.

data.name: AccountTenantMissingMessage
data.value: Account is not linked to a tenant.

data.name: TenantInactiveMessage
data.value: Your tenant is inactive. Contact the system administrator.

data.name: RegistrationFieldsAlreadyUsedMessage
data.value: The following fields are already used: {0}.
